title: How do you duplicate a project/item and have it also duplicate its subitems?
excerpt: I have a board where I want to create project templates, each having their own list of subitems. My goal is to be able to then duplicate the template item and it carries over all the subitems for that project/item to the…

posts.author: JeremyCBP (Jeremy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board where I want to create project templates, each having their own list of subitems. My goal is to be able to then duplicate the template item and it carries over all the subitems for that project/item to the new copy. Right now, when I duplicate it, it resets the subitems and they’re not in the new copy.

Is this an error, or is there a special way to do it?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: When I duplicate an item with subitems, the subitems also duplicate. It might be an error? Do you have automations set up around subitems when items are created that could be overwriting it?

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s not an error, it’s how Monday handles duplication by default. To include subitems, make sure to select “Duplicate with subitems” when duplicating the item. If that option isn’t visible, you might need to enable subitems in the board settings.

posts.author: jpulley (Janice Pulley)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you elaborate on this please? I’m suddenly running into this issue and not seeing anything in the board settings or in the options while duplicating.

posts.author: jure (Jure)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I am having the same problem and I cant find any setings so that I could enable to duplicate with subitems. only with or without updates.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JeremyCBP @jpulley @jure

You can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

You can use it to duplicate the item and its subitems to multiple different boards. You can also choose to add updates(comments) for the item.

Whenever an item/subitem value changes, it also syncs values so that the item/subitem always reflects latest data.

Feel free to schedule a call with us for a quick demo or reach out at support@fortimus.co for any questions!
